allow: Bash(osascript -e 'display notification ""Claude has finished"" with title ""Claude Code""')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d[''''name''''], d[''''type'''']\) for d in data if isinstance\(data, list\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d[''''name''''], d[''''type'''']\) for d in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d[''''name''''], d[''''download_url'''']\) for d in data]")

hooks.prompt: A file was just written or edited. Check the tool input in $ARGUMENTS to get the file path. Read that file and check if any new functions were added. If yes, write or update a local test for each new function — create a test file next to the source file if one doesn't exist yet (e.g. foo.test.ts next to foo.ts, test_foo.py next to foo.py). Keep tests minimal and runnable locally.
